

# System Specifications Template

This template provides a structured format for documenting system specifications for libretro cores.

## Core Name
[Insert Core Name Here]

## CPU Requirements

| Feature               | Details                                                                 |
|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Minimum CPU Speed     | [Insert Minimum CPU Speed, e.g., 100 MHz]                              |
| Recommended CPU Speed | [Insert Recommended CPU Speed, e.g., 300 MHz]                          |
| Architecture          | [Insert Architecture, e.g., ARM, x86, MIPS]                            |
| Endianness           | [Insert Endianness, e.g., Little, Big]                                 |
| SIMD Support         | [Insert SIMD Support, e.g., NEON, SSE, AVX]                           |

## Memory Requirements

| Feature               | Details                                                                 |
|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Minimum RAM           | [Insert Minimum RAM, e.g., 16 MB]                                       |
| Recommended RAM       | [Insert Recommended RAM, e.g., 64 MB]                                   |
| Cache Requirements    | [Insert Cache Requirements, e.g., 32 KB instruction, 16 KB data]      |

## GPU API Support

| API                  | Version       | Notes                                                                 |
|----------------------|---------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| OpenGL               | [Insert Version, e.g., 1.1, 2.0, 3.0]  | [Insert Notes, e.g., ES 2.0, Core Profile]                            |
| Vulkan               | [Insert Version, e.g., 1.0, 1.1]      | [Insert Notes, e.g., Core Features, Extensions]                       |
| Direct3D            | [Insert Version, e.g., 9, 11, 12]     | [Insert Notes, e.g., 9ex, Feature Level 11_0]                        |

## Save State Compatibility

| Feature               | Details                                                                 |
|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Save State Support    | [Insert Support Status, e.g., Yes, No, Partial]                       |
| Save State Version    | [Insert Version, e.g., 1.0, 2.0]                                        |
| Save State Notes      | [Insert Notes, e.g., Requires specific core version, Compatible with all versions] |

## Additional Notes
[Insert any additional notes about the system requirements, limitations, or special considerations]
